title: Data Processor Agreement – PeopleSync HR Vendor
body:
**DATA PROCESSOR AGREEMENT**

**This Data Processor Agreement ("DPA") is entered into effective as of March 1, 2026, by and between:**

**TechCorp Inc.** ("Controller"), a software company with offices in [Location], and **PeopleSync Inc.** ("Processor"), a human resources technology provider, together referred to as the "Parties."

**1. PURPOSE AND SCOPE**

1.1 This DPA governs the processing of personal data of TechCorp employees by PeopleSync on behalf of TechCorp, as required under applicable data protection laws, including the General Data Protection Regulation (EU) 2016/679 ("GDPR"), the Data Protection Act 2018 (UK), the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), and all other applicable data protection and privacy laws (collectively, "Data Protection Laws").

1.2 This DPA is incorporated as an addendum to the Master Service Agreement between the Parties dated [Insert Date] ("Principal Agreement") and forms an integral and binding part thereof. In the event of any conflict between this DPA and the Principal Agreement, this DPA shall take precedence with respect to the processing of personal data.

**2. DEFINITIONS**

2.1 "Personal Data" means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person; an identifiable person is one who can be identified, directly or indirectly, by reference to an identifier such as a name, identification number, location data, or online identifier.

2.2 "Processing" means any operation performed on Personal Data, such as collection, recording, organization, structuring, storage, adaptation, retrieval, consultation, use, transmission, erasure, or destruction.

2.3 "Data Subject" means the employee whose Personal Data is processed, namely employees of TechCorp.

2.4 "Data Breach" means a breach of security leading to the accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorized disclosure, or access to Personal Data transmitted, stored, or otherwise processed.

**3. CATEGORIES OF PERSONAL DATA PROCESSED**

3.
